name: HR offboarding policy example
answer:
Employees receive their final paycheck within 7 calendar days after separation.
Employee system access is disabled at the end of the employee's last working day.
All departing employees receive 12 weeks of severance pay.

sources.title: HR Offboarding Policy
sources.content:
Employees receive their final paycheck within 7 calendar days after separation.
Employee system access is disabled at the end of the employee's last working day.
Severance pay is available only when specified in an individual separation agreement.
